title: rubus × prahlii
intro: Rubus × prahlii is a hybrid species of raspberry, known as the Himalayan raspberry, which is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × prahlii include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × prahlii include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and provide anti-aging properties due to its high levels of vitamins and minerals. Rubus × prahlii can be prepared as a herbal tea, jam, or dried berry, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
